caption: A man with a white beard, wearing a light beige long-sleeved shirt under a white sleeveless jacket, stands behind a brown wooden podium. He is positioned in front of a textured, dark green stone wall with geometric carvings and a cylindrical gold and glass pillar adorned with small pink flowers. Two thin microphones are mounted on the podium, curving toward him. As the scene progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his hands to emphasize his points. He starts with his hands resting near the podium, then brings them together in front of his chest, followed by a waving motion with his right hand, and finally raises his right hand with a finger pointed upward. His facial expression remains focused throughout the sequence as he delivers his address.
